description: Eliminated duplicate key string allocation in StorageEngine::set by accepting Into<String> and using owned key. Updated all client callers to move key instead of cloning.

asi.notes: Reduced one heap allocation and string copy per write operation by accepting owned key instead of &str and inserting directly.

description: Changed ToRedisArgs to return SmallVec<[Value; 1]> instead of Vec<Value>, eliminating heap allocation for the argument container in common single-argument operations.

asi.notes: Most operations take a single key/value argument; SmallVec stores that argument on the stack, avoiding a heap allocation for the Vec container.

description: Optimized key_to_string to use String::from_utf8 to take ownership of the allocated byte vector when valid UTF-8, avoiding an extra copy for keys. Fallback to lossy conversion for invalid UTF-8.

asi.notes: Key conversion no longer allocates a second String and copies bytes when the input is valid UTF-8 (common case).
